query:
SELECT id, cobertizo_id, localizacion, direccion, orientacion, flow_cat 
FROM paradas 
WHERE flow_cat IN ('041', '045') 
ORDER BY flow_cat, cobertizo_id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT id, cobertizo_id, localizacion, direccion, orientacion, flow_cat 
FROM paradas 
WHERE flow_cat IN ('041', '045') 
ORDER BY flow_cat, cobertizo_id;
